title: Elbaf’s Warriors Turn Dark
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We hoped we wouldn't have to bother you, but she really needs help!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we stretch our hands all the way we can't reach her...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had to ask you for help old man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm not some random old man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you know a hero of justice when you see one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Grab this, I'll pull you back up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess children really are good judges of character...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my, and kind to boot! You even came down for me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be more efficient to just climb up, hold on tight!!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
